title: "PREWHERE" for queries with FINAL
description:
### Company or project name
https://www.innervate.com/
### Use case
Queries with FINAL maybe improved, they can filter granules before applying FINAL.
@shiyer7474
Here is an example:
```
create table T (K Int64, C0 String, C1 String, C2 String) Engine=ReplacingMergeTree order by K;
insert into T select number, arrayMap ( i-> cityHash64(i*number), range(10)), number, '' from numbers(5e7);
insert into T select 42, '', '', '';
set do_not_merge_across_partitions_select_final=1, use_query_condition_cache=0;
```
### Current state of art: Elapsed: 2.379 sec.
```
set do_not_merge_across_partitions_select_final=1, use_query_condition_cache=0;
select * from T final where C1 = '42';
Ok.
0 rows in set. Elapsed: 2.379 sec. Processed 50.01 million rows, 11.82 GB (21.02 million rows/s., 4.97 GB/s.)
Peak memory usage: 20.51 MiB.
```
### Manual optimization: Elapsed: 0.179 sec.
```
set do_not_merge_across_partitions_select_final=1, use_query_condition_cache=0;
select * from T final  where K in (select K from T where  C1 = '42') and C1 = '42';
Ok.
0 rows in set. Elapsed: 0.179 sec. Processed 50.02 million rows, 792.70 MB (278.93 million rows/s., 4.42 GB/s.)
Peak memory usage: 8.27 MiB.
```
### optimize_move_to_prewhere_if_final -> incorrect result (expected by design)
```
select * from T final where C1 = '42' settings optimize_move_to_prewhere_if_final=1;
в”Њв”Ђв”ЂKв”Ђв”¬в”ЂC0в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
1. в”‚ 42 в”‚ [4761183170873013810,11490350930367293593,15220094066153222822,7453518272804512073,17127718678445484
в””в”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”ґв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђв”Ђ
```

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE T1 (K BIGINT, C0 VARCHAR(255), C1 VARCHAR(255), C2 DOUBLE) ENGINE=InnoDB;

INSERT INTO T1 (K, C0, C1, C2) SELECT number, CONCAT_WS(',', number * 1), IF(number % 2 = 0, 'even', NULL), number * 1.5 FROM (SELECT @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS number FROM (SELECT 1 UNION SELECT 2 UNION SELECT 3 UNION SELECT 4 UNION SELECT 5) t1, (SELECT @rownum := 0) t2 LIMIT 100) AS numbers;
CREATE TABLE T2 (K BIGINT, C0 VARCHAR(255), C1 INT) ENGINE=InnoDB;
INSERT INTO T2 (K, C0, C1) SELECT K, C0, CAST(K AS SIGNED) FROM T1 WHERE C1 IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Incorrect results with FINAL and optimize_move_to_prewhere_if_final
